data.title: Peraton Appoints Justin R. Ciaccio as President of National Aerospace Solutions Sector
data.description: In Reston, Va., Peraton, a prominent mission capability integrator and technology firm for crucial U.S. government programs, has named Justin R. Ciaccio as President of the National Aerospace Solutions (NAS) sector. Ciaccio will oversee the Federal Aviation Administration's Brand New Air Traffic Control Systems program (BNATCS). Ciaccio's leadership is seen as vital for this role, given his extensive experience in navigating challenging projects.

data.title: Americans' views of China have grown somewhat more positive in recent years
data.description: In April 14, 2026, a recent survey by the Pew Research Center revealed that for over ten years, the majority of Americans held unfavorable opinions towards China. However, there has been a slight increase in the percentage of Americans with a positive view. As of March, 27% of Americans currently hold a favorable view of China.

data.title: Meta, Broadcom Extend Multi-Year AI Chip Partnership, Stocks Climb
data.description: Shares of Meta Platforms Inc. (NASDAQ: META) and Broadcom Inc. (NASDAQ: AVGO) saw an increase during extended trading on Tuesday following an announcement of an extended partnership to develop the industry's first 2nm AI compute accelerator. This collaboration is set to lay the groundwork for a multi-gigawatt infrastructure deployment by 2029 to support Meta's upcoming MTIA (Meta Training and Inference Accelerator) chips. The deal also involves Broadcom's XPU custom technology. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: In HelloNation, Insurance Expert Matt Pancake of Winter Garden, FL, Guides First-Time Homeowners on Home Insurance
data.description: In Winter Garden, Florida, a recent article by HelloNation discusses crucial points about home insurance that first-time homeowners should consider before finalizing their purchase. Featuring advice from Matt Pancake at Bill Pancake Insurance Agency, Inc., the piece provides essential insights for new buyers entering the market. By addressing key concerns, such as coverage options, deductibles, and premiums, the article serves as a valuable resource for individuals navigating the process of purchasing a home.

data.title: Presidio Declares First Dividend as a Public Company
data.description: In Fort Worth, Texas, Presidio Production Company (NYSE: FTW) declared a special cash dividend of $0.10125 per share of Class A Common Stock. This yield-focused oil and gas operator in the US specializes in acquiring and optimizing producing oil and natural gas wells without drilling. The Q1 2026 dividend of $0.10125 is a pro rata amount for the period.

data.title: DeFi exchange CoW Swap halts protocol after website breach; co-founded by Vitalik Buterin; front-end attack.
data.description: CoW Swap, an exchange platform endorsed by Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin, temporarily halted its operations due to a front-end breach.

data.title: FEMSA Schedules Conference Call to Discuss First Quarter Financial Results
data.description: Fomento Económico Mexicano, S.A.B. de C.V., known as FEMSA, has announced its upcoming First Quarter Conference Call scheduled for April 14, 2026. The company, listed on NYSE as FMX and on BMV as FEMSAUBD and FEMSAUB, invites participation in the call.

data.title: In HelloNation, Montessori Education Expert Madelynn Van Den Heuvel Explains Meeting Individual Learning Needs
data.description: In Santa Cruz, California on April 14, 2026, a report discussed how Montessori classrooms cater to individual children's learning styles and developmental levels. The article explored whether schools can effectively adjust to each child's specific pace and characteristics.

data.title: PrideStaff Fresno Moves to New Office to Support Continued Growth
data.description: PrideStaff, a nationally franchised staffing organization, recently revealed that its Fresno office in California has shifted to a larger suite at 675 West Nees Ave, Suite 107, Fresno, CA 93711. The move comes as a result of the ongoing expansion of the Fresno branch, showing the company's commitment to growth in the region.

data.title: ADMA Biologics, Inc. (ADMA) Crashes 16% Amid Scrutiny Over Skyrocketing Days Sales Outstanding That Short Seller Claims Points to Improper Channel Stuffing, Hagens Berman Investigating
data.description: On March 24, 2026, following a report by short seller Culper Research titled "ADMA Biologics Inc. (ADMA): Channel Stuffing, an Undisclosed Related Party Distributor," shareholders of ADMA Biologics, Inc. (NASDAQ: ADMA) experienced a significant drop in the price of their shares, with a decrease of over 16%. This event occurred in San Francisco and had a noticeable impact on the company's stock value.

data.title: In HelloNation, Insurance Expert Brian Pancake of St. Cloud, FL, Shares Home Insurance Tips for Homebuyers
data.description: In St. Cloud, Florida on April 14, 2026, valuable advice was shared for potential home buyers. The importance of asking the right questions before closing on a home was highlighted in an article by HelloNation, featuring guidance from Brian Pancake of Bill Pancake Insurance Agency, Inc. This informative piece discusses crucial insurance aspects to consider before making a property purchase, providing valuable insights to safeguard the investment. Understanding these factors can significantly impact the decision-making process for individuals seeking to buy a home in St. Cloud or elsewhere.

data.title: Harry Davis & Company Brokers Sale of Alpenrose Butter Operations to Plant Based Innovations
data.description: Pittsburgh-based Harry Davis & Company (HDC) disclosed the completion of the sale of the previous Alpenrose butter, sour cream, and ice cream mix operations in Clackamas, Oregon. Approximately 35 jobs have been retained thanks to the acquisition, securing ongoing production and bolstering the local dairy supply chain. The purchaser, Plant Based Innovations (PBI), boasts three advanced manufacturing sites strategically positioned on both the East and West Coasts.

data.title: Nine Energy Service Announces Timing of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: Nine Energy Service, a company based in Houston, has announced the schedule for the release of its first quarter 2026 financial results. The earnings release and accompanying conference call will take place on a date specified by the company. This important event will provide investors and stakeholders with insights into Nine Energy Service's performance during the initial quarter of the year, offering a glimpse into their financial health and operational status. Such updates are crucial for assessing the company's trajectory and making informed decisions.

data.title: Liberty Energy Inc. Announces Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: In Denver, Liberty Energy Inc. (NYSE: LBRT) revealed the declaration of a dividend at $0.09 for each Class A common stock share. The dividend is set to be distributed on June 18, 2026, to shareholders listed as of June 4, 2026. Future decisions regarding quarterly cash dividends are contingent upon the Board of Directors' approval and their ongoing assessment that such dividends align with Liberty's best interests.

data.title: U.S. DISTRICT COURT FINDS BUSINESSMAN ALEX ROVIROSA INNOCENT IN HISTORIC REBUKE OF DOJ'S BASELESS PROSECUTION
data.description: Rovirosa has become only the fourth individual in 50 years to have their FCPA conviction overturned, allowing him to move forward as a free and innocent man. This decision was reached by the United States District Court for the Southern District of Texas under the Honorable Kenneth M. Hoyt. This ruling comes after legal representation by R McConnell Group PLLC. The outcome marks a rare occurrence in which a conviction under the Foreign Corrupt Practices Act has been successfully challenged, providing a significant turning point in Rovirosa's life.

data.title: Richmond American Debuts New Community in Las Vegas
data.description: Two new floor plans are being introduced to the area at Iris Glen in Summerlin, Las Vegas. The Grand Opening event, scheduled for April 14, 2026, is being organized by Richmond American Homes of Nevada, Inc., a subsidiary of Sekisui House U.S., Inc. This marks an exciting addition to the neighborhood, offering fresh options for homebuyers in the area.
